description_long: This motorcycle features a streamlined, angular design with a predominantly blue and gray color scheme. The body is composed of a robust frame with a visible engine block and mechanical detailing on both sides. The wheels are large, with intricate spoke patterns and thick tires suitable for urban roads. The seat is a single, contoured piece in blue, positioned above a compact rear section that includes a small tail light. The handlebars are straight and simple, with blue grips, and the front headlight is circular and integrated into the front fairing. The overall appearance suggests a modern, possibly custom-built motorcycle designed for city commuting.
description: A modern, angular blue and gray motorcycle with a visible engine, large wheels, and a single blue seat, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, engine details, blue seat, and the full length of the motorcycle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular headlight, straight handlebars with blue grips, and the width of the front tire.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, engine details, and the rear section with tail light.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tail light, rear tire, and the back of the blue seat.
